hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Three decades of experience in excellent furniture

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Founded in 1995, <brand>J. Mendes Mobiliário</brand> was born from a passion for carpentry and a commitment to excellence.
story.paragraph2: We started as a small artisan workshop and grew to become a benchmark in the custom furniture industry.
story.paragraph3: Today, we serve clients in Portugal and abroad, always with the same level of dedication and attention to detail.
story.imageAlt1: Image from the history of J. Mendes Furniture
story.imageAlt2: Image of the J. Mendes Furniture team

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Create exceptional furniture that transforms spaces and exceeds expectations.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be a European benchmark in high-quality custom furniture.

values.title: Values
values.description: Excellence, innovation and commitment to the client in every project.

hero.title: Our Process
hero.subtitle: From the first contact to final installation, every stage is carefully planned to ensure excellence and complete satisfaction

briefing.title: Client Briefing
briefing.description: An initial meeting to understand needs, preferences and budget. We analyze the space and discuss possibilities.

project3d.title: 3D Project
project3d.description: Creation of photorealistic 3D models that let you see exactly how the furniture will look in the space before production.

production.title: Factory Production
production.description: Manufacturing with latest-generation CNC equipment. Rigorous quality control at every stage of the production process.

finishes.title: Finishes
finishes.description: Application of varnishes, lacquers and special finishes. Each piece is inspected and prepared for installation.

delivery.title: Delivery & Installation
delivery.description: Safe transport and professional installation. Final fitting and adjustments to ensure complete satisfaction.

timeline.title: From Concept to Reality
timeline.subtitle: Average execution time: 4-8 weeks, depending on project complexity
